hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Trung tâm thành phố Buôn Ma Thuột (Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre)

reviews.title: Disappointing with the Hilton brand
reviews.text:
I am writing to express my disappointment regarding the handling of my recent stay at your hotel.

Firstly, your front desk staff called to my room advising me to contact Agoda to cancel the duplicate reservation and informed me that the hotel would assist with the matter afterward. I followed this instruction and contacted Agoda, who confirmed that they had agreed to process the cancellation and refund for the duplicate transaction. However, the situation was not resolved as expected, which caused unnecessary inconvenience.

Secondly, I had reserved four rooms for two nights. In reality, we only used three rooms during our stay. Despite this, the two occupied rooms were not cleaned, and basic amenities such as bottled water were not replenished during the stay. 

This was quite surprising and disappointing. Given the reputation associated with the Hilton brand, I believe guests should reasonably expect a higher standard of service and guest care. The way this situation was handled does not reflect the level of hospitality typically associated with Hilton.

reviews.title: I’m very disappointed to the Hilton hotel I’m usually put the Hilton rooms in America and that’s why I can just use Hilt
reviews.positives: I booked this hotel due to the name of Hilton, but this is very poor service they charge for everything but on the service side it’s very poor
reviews.negatives: Honestly, nothing because service is poor, breakfast option nothing nothing is on time available. Nobody have to care and ask to the customer why they are waiting and what they need. It’s just like mismanagement they put like a young kids on their counter. Nobody have to real person which you have talked and addressed the concern.

reviews.title: Room light
reviews.text: The lights in the room wouldn't turn off, so when I called the staff, I was told to wait a moment. After that, when they got back to me, I was advised to refer to an online guide. It might have been late at night, but there was no online guide, and they didn't provide me with the URL, just hung up unilaterally, which left me quite dissatisfied with the response. Since the lights were on and I couldn't sleep, I forcibly removed the switch cover and pressed it, which turned off the lights. It seems that none of my colleagues who stayed in other rooms had any problems, so it might just be an issue with the room I stayed in. Honestly, breakfast was not good. Everyone said that. Even though it has Hilton in the name, it's better not to have high expectations. However, since it is in a rural area, I think it's within a reasonable range. The room had lighting like a love hotel, but it was clean, which I think is important for Japanese people.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your experience with us.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you encountered with the electricity in your room and for the unclear guidance provided by our staff. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to deliver. We will review our support procedures, retrain our night-shift team, and inspect the electrical system to ensure that similar issues do not occur again.

We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast and other aspects of the hotel. We also appreciate your feedback regarding the room size, and we will take it into consideration for future improvements.

We truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a better experience on your next stay.
Thank you once again for your valuable feedback

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything is good but only room is tiny

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: It's acceptable, I used to be at this hotel of the old management, it's much better than the new one.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for sharing your positive feedback about our hotel. We’re delighted to know that you were satisfied with the cleanliness of the room and the friendliness of our staff. Our team is committed to continuously improving to provide an even better experience for our guests. We look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Best regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: new, clean ..

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel is upstairs, and below it is a bank. There is no one or any sign to indicate how to park or how to go up. You have to go around to the back, and the staff is not very welcoming or enthusiastic. The only good thing is the modern style and online control, but the service is not good.

reviews.title: The staff are exceptional, they are helpful, diligent and display a positive attitude. The breakfast provided a solid se
reviews.positives: The property is centrally located creating easy access to points of interest.  The front desk / lobby is easily accessed on the second floor, with efficient elevator service. The property is well maintained and the 6 floors of rooms / rooms are immaculate.
reviews.negatives:
Everything was at an exceptional standard.  
I have no negative comments or concerns.

reviews.title: Extremely Thin Walls - Privacy Issue
reviews.text: "This is a very compact and nicely designed hotel. However, the walls are extremely thin, and you can hear every sound from the room next door. I understand that during the off-season, the hotel may group guests on the same floor or in adjacent rooms for cleaning efficiency. But because of this, the noise from neighboring rooms made it impossible to sleep at night. If there are vacancies, the hotel should assign rooms with at least one empty room between guests to ensure privacy and quiet. Prioritizing operational efficiency over the guests' basic need for a good night's sleep is a serious issue for any hotel."
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Thank you very much for sharing your feedback regarding your stay.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced due to noise from neighboring rooms. We completely understand that a good night’s sleep is a basic expectation for our guests, and we regret that this was not met during your stay.
We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more restful experience in the future.
Kind regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.positives: Very clean

reviews.title: Modern hotel, unique style.
reviews.text:
This is a hotel following the SOJO model. I didn't know this before I arrived, so I was a bit surprised that the first floor of the building is a bank, and the reception is on the second floor. The hotel has very few staff; when I arrived, I had to go up and wait a while before a staff member came down to assist with parking and help with the luggage. It was a bit unfamiliar as I'm used to the old model where staff greet you in the lobby and take the luggage to the room right away.

On the plus side, the hotel looks very modern, with automatic curtain systems and lighting. The rooms are decorated in a youthful and modern style. After reading more about this model, I found out there is an app to control the devices in the room (on your phone), but the staff didn’t introduce it.

In summary, if guests want to experience a new model, they can consider this hotel, but if they are used to the traditional model, they may find it a bit uncomfortable.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent stay.

Our property previously operated under the SOJO Hotels model. However, we have now officially transitioned to Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre. As part of this transition, certain features from the former concept — including the in-room mobile app control system — are no longer available.

We understand that the reception located on the second floor and our streamlined staffing model may feel unfamiliar, especially for guests accustomed to traditional hotel service with lobby reception and immediate luggage assistance. That said, our team is always available and ready to assist whenever needed. We also appreciate your comment regarding the introduction of hotel features, and we will reinforce our team’s communication to ensure guests receive clearer guidance upon arrival.

We are pleased to know that you appreciated the modern design and youthful atmosphere of th
reviews.room_type: King Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient stay in good location
reviews.positives: We had a great stay at Tru Hotel. It is a very modern and fresh looking hotel of a kind that is not common in Vietnam. The rooms are small but very comfortable and well equipped. I especially enjoyed the soft comfortable bed, quite unusual in these parts of the world. Breakfast was simply but of good quality. The staff was friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: The water pressure in the shower could have been stronger

reviews.title: Expect more for a 4-star hotel
reviews.text: Place looks chick, clean crisp sheet and comforter is nice, floor is clean, shower is ok, wish somehow it doesn’t wet the floor by the toilet, room is too small though, ok for one person because the big bed is set all the way to the wall, it’s hard for the inside person to get out.  Breakfast food is ok, nothing to write home about, this reviews is because hotel is listed as 4-star, if it was 3-star and cost a little less then it would be more appropriate.
reviews.response:
Thank you for your detailed and honest feedback. We’re glad to hear you appreciated the clean and stylish space, as well as the comfort of the bedding and overall room cleanliness.

We also truly value your comments regarding the bathroom layout and room size. Your observations about water from the shower and bed positioning are very helpful, and we will share them with our team for consideration and improvement.

We understand your perspective on the hotel rating and pricing, and we appreciate you sharing this insight. Your feedback helps us better align our offerings with guest expectations.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide an even better experience in the future.
Son Luu 
Guest Operations Manager 
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Établissement plutôt réservé aux jeunes.
reviews.positives: La propreté et l’équipement de l’établissement étaient au niveau.
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner : peu mieux faire. Le personnel était plus souvent sur leurs téléphones ou ordinateurs plutôt que d’essuyer les tables mais nous a bien aidé tout de même pour la laverie automatique.

reviews.title: Just enough
reviews.text: Vừa đủ để lưu trú đi công tác, vừa đủ đề nghri ngơi sau 1 ngày tham quan khám phá bên ngoài của kỳ nghỉ. Staff nice và dễ thương
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We are delighted to know that our hotel was a suitable place for both your business stay and for relaxing after a day of exploring the city.

It is also wonderful to hear that our staff made a positive impression with their friendliness and helpfulness. Your kind words are a great motivation for our team.

We truly appreciate your support and hope to welcome you back again in the future.
Son Luu

Guest Operations Manager

Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.text: Phòng thiết kế tối giản cho một city hotel, đáp ứng tốt nhu cầu. Mọi thứ đều sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. Có banh bàn và đồ chơi cho em bé. Có phòng giặt sấy rất tiện mặc dù tốn phí. Có một gym be bé nhưng không thấy ai sử dụng. Sẽ ở lại khi quay lại BMT.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your experience at our hotel. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the minimalist design, cleanliness, and tidiness of the room, as well as the facilities for children, the laundry room, and our gym.
We look forward to welcoming you back to Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre on your next visit to Buon Ma Thuot.
Kind regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that you were satisfied with most aspects of your stay. We’re sorry that the breakfast did not meet your expectations, and we will work on improving it. We hope to welcome you back for an even better experience next time!

reviews.title: très agréable

reviews.negatives: certains personnels ont du mal à s'exprimer en anglais

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Stayed at Tru by Hilton in Buon Me Thuot for a few nights — nice surprise for a budget-friendly chain stay.

The room was modern and bright with a comfy bed, good AC and tidy bathroom. A huge window in the room is a plus — lots of natural light and a nice view. Decor is simple but fresh, and housekeeping kept things clean. Wifi worked well enough for messaging and light browsing. Staff were friendly and helpful — front desk gave good local tips and arranged a taxi easily.

Breakfast was basic but decent: eggs, bread, fruit and coffee — nothing fancy but convenient. Location is practical, close to the city center and easy to get around from, with shops and restaurants a short ride away. Noise was minimal at night; I slept fine.

If you want something reliable, clean and affordable in Buon Me Thuot, this is a solid pick. Not a luxury experience, but great value for the price.
reviews.response:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful and detailed review! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us, especially the bright and modern room, comfortable bed, and peaceful nights. It’s great to know our team could assist you with local tips and transportation arrangements.

We’re also glad you found our location convenient and our breakfast suitable for a quick start to the day. Your kind words about cleanliness and overall value truly mean a lot to us.

We hope to welcome you back again on your next visit to Buon Ma Thuot!
Son Luu

Guest Operations Manager

Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Hôtel moderne
reviews.positives: Hôtel moderne avec une chambre de taille moyenne mais avec une grande baie vitrée qui donnait sur la ville. Salle commune avec des jeux. Il y a une machine à laver et à sécher pour un petit prix. Bon petit déjeuner.

reviews.title: The hotel reception is very enthusiastic, but Agoda is very indifferent.
reviews.text: I booked a hotel room through the Agoda app and paid for it, but when I arrived at the hotel, the rooms were already sold out, and Agoda still accepted my booking. With a pregnant woman and a 10-month-old baby at 10 PM in the mountainous area, I provided all my contact information to Agoda. If it weren't for the reception staff at True by Hilton, I would have had to experience being homeless for the first time in my life last night. And I had to pay for a room at another hotel at a higher price, with a quality that can only be described as barely satisfactory. 😒😒😒

reviews.title: très grande surprise dans le bon sens et qualité exceptionnelle du service
reviews.positives: Personnel exceptionnel aux petits soins, n'hésitant pas à montre 3 fois dans la chambre pour un problème d'ordinateur et m'emmener à moto aller acheter une carte SIM. Hôtel extremement moderne en très bon état

reviews.title: Khách sạn nhỏ dễ thương
reviews.text: Phòng nhỏ nhưng đầy đủ tiện ích. Phong cách trẻ trung hiện đại dễ thương. Phòng chơi có nhiều hoạt động cho trẻ em. Sẽ tiếp tục chọn khách sạn này nếu quay lại BMT

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: On a apprécié le cadre moderne. La chambre est pratique, bien agencé. Petit déjeuner bon. Personnel dévoué et efficace.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Everything is fine except there is no razor, cotton swabs, and hair cap (essential items).
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Thank you very much for your feedback and for sharing your experience with us.
Please kindly note that personal amenity kits, including shaving razors, cotton swabs, and hair caps, are not pre-set in the guest rooms as part of our brand standard at Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre. However, these items are certainly available upon request. Guests are welcome to contact our Front Desk at any time, and our team will be happy to assist promptly.
We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused during your stay. Your feedback is truly appreciated, and we will continue improving our communication to ensure guests are well informed about available amenities.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.
Best regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Modern efficiently designed hotel with super helpful and attentive staffs
reviews.text: Love the thoughtful and efficient design throughout hotel and rooms, although could a separate towel rack for the sink.  Rooms are a bit tight but very clean and comfortable.   There are plenty of shared common areas - relaxing lounge, game area with foosball and board games, gym, dining tables.  Front desk staffs automatically send up a kettle after providing me some hot water in the cafe.  They were also very helpful with calling nearby coffee plantations for arranging English guided tours

reviews.title: Prima hotel
reviews.positives: Goed bed, maar je moest er overheen kruipen om erin te komen. Lekker warme douche.
reviews.negatives: In een 4* hotel valt het ontbijt eigenlijk altijd tegen. Vooral het brood. Deze keer was er ook bruin tostibrood. Al een verbetering! En kaas!

reviews.title: True
reviews.text: The room is clean, decorated in a Japanese style, minimalistic yet comfortable. The bed next to the window is very impressive. I will come back if I have the chance to go to Buon Ma Thuot.

reviews.title: 飯店很新, 早餐蠻好吃的, 環境乾淨, 服務人員和氣善良.
reviews.positives: 早餐不錯, 位置離中心不遠, 但是旁邊沒有便利商店
reviews.negatives:
1.房間有幾盞燈是壞掉的, 空調只有入住那天調整過一次, 接下來就無法調整, 
2. 每一盞燈都很亮, 沒有睡眠燈. 
3. 每天早上電視會自動打開, 第一天被嚇到.
4. 入住四天, 備用衛生紙都快用完了, 旁邊沒有補充一卷新衛生紙在旁邊. 讓人很緊張, 去櫃檯問也只說明天再補充, 問題是, 附近也沒便利商店, 如果半夜真的用完了怎麼辦....讓人很擔心.

reviews.title: Rất hài lòng nhé
reviews.text: Mình thấy hotel này quá tốt cho mức giá này. Chuẩn như các khách sạn mình từng ở

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
1.旅館很新、佈置很年輕很潮，是個很有想法的旅館（很多越南年輕人住這間）

2.房間很現代、很明亮，電動開關控制窗簾(兩層)上下移動，特色杯子、拖鞋都很潮

3.地點在市區，如果有安排市區行程，住這邊算是蠻方便的

4.有販賣機，給不想出遠門買東西的人使用，算是蠻方便的

5.服務人員態度都蠻好的

6.遇到國慶假期，剛好推出洗衣免費的活動，可以使用房間內的洗衣袋裝自己的衣服，之後交給櫃檯(旅館人員說，在預計要拿衣服的前3個小時，把衣服交給他們就可以了)，旅館有幫我洗衣+烘衣+折衣，我拿回來時很感動和滿意

reviews.title: Great location, value for money
reviews.text: The hotel is quite new. The location is perfect with most of our visits are 10 mins walk from the hotel. The staff is friendly and helpful. The room is value for money, clean and quiet. We would stay here again if we are in Buon Ma Thuot.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your kind feedback! We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed our new facilities, convenient location, and found it easy to reach many attractions within a short walk.

It’s also wonderful to know that our team made a positive impression with their friendliness and helpfulness, and that you were satisfied with the clean, quiet room and overall value for money.

We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Buon Ma Thuot!
Son Luu 
Guest Operations Manager 
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot city centre

reviews.title: Bất ổn nhưng khách sạn đã cố gắng khắc phục
reviews.positives: Khách sạn khá là khó hiểu. Máy bay mình hạ cánh hơi muộn nên lúc mình đến nơi thì đã muộn rồi, nhưng checkin không được nhanh cho lắm. Sau đó thì khách sạn checkin cho mình vào 2 phòng 1 giường đôi thay vì 1 phòng 1 giường đôi và 1 phòng 2 giường đơn như mình đã đặt. Ní chung là khá bất ổn (với mình). Sau đó thì khách sạn cũng có xử lý nhanh bằng cách lấy thêm 1 phòng giường đôi cho mình nữa và không tính phí, nhưng nói chung là nó vẫn rất cấn cấn sao đó.
reviews.negatives: Chỉ dẫn lên quầy checkin không rõ ràng. Không có sẵn nhân viên trực quầy nên thời gian đợi checkin lâu.

reviews.title: Highly recommend hotel in Buôn Ma Thuột
reviews.text: Nếu có dịp quay lại Buôn Ma Thuột, mình chắc chắn sẽ chọn Tru by Hilton. Mọi thứ đều trên cả tuyệt vời ngoại trừ một điểm nhỏ khiến mình không hài lòng lắm là TV trong phòng không có internet để xem YouTube. Hy vọng lần sau ghé lại bên mình sẽ cải thiện điểm này 😁
reviews.response:
Chào chị, Trước hết, bên em thành thật xin lỗi vì sự cố nghiêm trọng đã xảy ra với gia đình mình. Việc chị đã thanh toán và có xác nhận đặt phòng nhưng khi đến nơi lại không còn phòng, đặc biệt trong hoàn cảnh có mẹ bầu và em bé nhỏ vào lúc 10h đêm, là điều hoàn toàn không ai mong muốn. Hiện tại bên em đã tiến hành xử lý hoàn tiền đầy đủ cho booking của chị và đang rà soát lại toàn bộ quy trình làm việc với đối tác Agoda để tránh tái diễn những trường hợp tương tự. Chúng em cũng rất cảm kích sự hỗ trợ kịp thời từ đội ngũ lễ tân tại True by Hilton đã giúp gia đình mình có chỗ nghỉ an toàn trong đêm. Trân trọng.
Best regards, 
Son Luu Guest Operations Manager 
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: It is ok for 1 or 2 nights, but I would not stay next time.
reviews.positives: Tôi nghĩ vị trí của khách sạn tương đối tốt, tôi đi bằng ô tô và chỗ đậu rất thoải mái. Phòng khách sạn hơi nhỏ, nhưng nệm tốt, tôi có giấc ngủ ngon ở đây
reviews.negatives: Bố trí nhà vệ sinh quá tệ, không có thông gió, bí bách, ẩm, tối…. Phòng vệ sính ở một khách sạn 4 sao mà giống một nhà vệ sinh lưu động ở những khu công cộng.

reviews.title: EXPERIENCE VACATION
reviews.text: The room is new, clean, and comfortable, but ours is a little small. It's worth coming back for a second time.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your review. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed your stay at our hotel.
We look forward to welcoming you back in the future.
Kind regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located. Everything is good from the rooms to the staff. I have stayed at this hotel in different provinces and am very satisfied. The only suggestion is that the hotel should improve the quality of breakfast, currently, the breakfast is very poor compared to the room rate.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We’re delighted to know that you had a pleasant stay and appreciated our clean rooms and breakfast. We truly value your suggestion regarding breakfast quality and will certainly consider it for future improvement. We hope to welcome you back again soon.

Warm regards, 
Son Luu 
Guest Operations Manager 
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Очень рекомендую остановиться здесь на несколько дней, когда приезжаете в город – не пожалеете
reviews.positives:
Невероятно милый персонал. Нам помогли с бронированием машины, с оплатой байков, для которых у нас не хватало местного банковского счёта. 
Номер уютный, с классной кроватью. Да, он маленький, но очень хорошо организован и продуман. На завтрак выбор небольшой, но всё вкусно и сытно
reviews.negatives:
Иногда на завтраке слишком быстро кончался шведский стол и его не особо пополняли. Не скажу, что это было критично, просто отметила такой момент
И ещё в номере не было ложки для обуви и даже возможности её купить на ресепшн( эх

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: ks sạch sẽ , view đẹp , không gian thoải mái , món ăn sáng cũng rất ngon
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn rất nhiều vì đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm tích cực tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết bạn hài lòng với sự sạch sẽ, không gian thoải mái, tầm nhìn đẹp cũng như bữa sáng ngon miệng.

Những lời khen của bạn là nguồn động lực lớn để đội ngũ chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ mỗi ngày. Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón bạn quay trở lại trong thời gian tới!
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot city centre

reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ phản hồi dễ thương! Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn hài lòng với sự sạch sẽ của phòng và sự nhiệt tình, thân thiện của nhân viên. Dù phòng có hơi nhỏ, chúng tôi rất vui khi điều đó không ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm của bạn. Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón bạn quay trở lại!
Son Luu 
Guest Operations Manager 
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: The room is clean, but too small for the price

reviews.negatives: The room rate is a bit too dear

reviews.title: 目前住過hilton旗下最便宜也最差的旅館
reviews.text: 價格低廉，房間雖小但舒適乾淨，但早餐品質不佳，並且櫃檯員工寧願聊天也不願清潔大廳桌面，到處都沒人但都是碗盤，並且wifi品質不佳，飲用水提供很少。
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your stay with us.
We sincerely apologize for the aspects of your experience that did not meet your expectations, including the breakfast quality, Wi-Fi performance, and the amount of drinking water provided in the room. Your comments are very valuable, and we will review and improve these areas to enhance the overall guest experience in the future.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more enjoyable stay next time.
Kind regards,
Son Luu
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Buon Ma Thuot City Centre

reviews.title: Comfy hotel but poor breakfast
reviews.positives:
The staff were very helpful, especially Christine on reception.
The rooms were clean and towels were changed daily and the bins emptied.
reviews.negatives:
The bathroom was unusual, an opaque glass pod with the shower and toilet in, but the hand basin was in the bedroom. 
Hand lotion by the basin but no liquid soap that was in the pod, so you had to put soap on your hands and go out of the bathroom.
The breakfast was very poor, lots of trays and  plates  but most were empty and very slow to refill, only 3 pieces of sliced bread, no jam, they were not refilled during our time at breakfast.
The coffee pot was empty, we asked for a refill, that took ages. Not many fruit choices, no croissants at all. 
The staff were very slow to clear tables and clean the tables. 
When we checked out at 12 there were still uncleared tables and pieces of food in the sitting area. 
In saying all of the above, it was clean and comfortable, staff were helpful, just need to sort out the breakfast.

reviews.title: Happy
reviews.positives: We were 5 night in Dak Lak. Four nights were in a luxury hotel and had to shift here as no availability. Sojo came at half the price. However, though the property was small and with skeleton staff, we were surprised that facilities were minimal but perfect. Everything was clean, auto functional and staff friendly. Nice place to stay, especially when one is coming back to hotel for the night

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel is very good located and for the price very fair. They also recommended us a great driver that took us to the Yok Don national park to see the elephants and to the waterfalls around.
reviews.negatives: The TV in our room didn’t work. In the mornings if you come for breakfast later than 9 AM (breakfast time is 6-10 AM) there is a big chance food is gone and they don’t necessarily refill things. During our three day stay we had the feeling that what was gone in terms of food,  was gone. So hurry up! Don’t wait too long to have your breakfast.
